+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "n8n: AWS (Assume Role) Credential Not Working in Workflows",
+    "description": "AWS (Assume Role) Credential Not Working in Workflows. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify n8n troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your n8n deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review n8n configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n\n```\n### Bug Description\n\nThis is in relation to the new AWS (Assume Role) Credential introduced in this PR and became available in 1.119.0:\n\nhttps://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/pull/20626\n\nWhen creating the credential when using AWS System Credentials to"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for AWS (Assume Role) Credential Not Working in Workflows",
+        "description": "can you please help prioritize this internally? As it stands, this credential is not working at all with system credential role assumption and has instance-level security considerations as long as it is not fixed. #22859 at a minimum should fix the major problems described in this issue.\n\nEDIT: as\n```yaml\n[ ] I have updated to the latest stable version of n8n [please specify version number] and I am still experiencing this issue\n[ ] Please close this issue – I am no longer experiencing it\n[ ] Please close this issue – [please specify a reason]\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm AWS (Assume Role) Credential Not Working in… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "can you please help prioritize this internally? As it stands, this credential is not working at all with system credential role assumption and has instance-level security considerations as long as it is not fixed. #22859 at a minimum should fix the major problems described in this issue.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[ ] I have updated to the latest stable version of n8n [please specify version number] and I am still experiencing this issue\n[ ] Please close this issue – I am no longer experiencing it\n[ ] Please close this issue – [please specify a reason]"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
